creator: hsn@netmag.cz
text:
unfetcheable distfile procmail-authenticate.c-userMaildir.patch

How-To-Repeat: sanatana# make WITH_COURIER_MAILDIR_KLUDGE=yes
=> procmail-authenticate.c-userMaildir.patch doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports
/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.john.net.au/pub/procmail-courier/.
fetch: http://www.john.net.au/pub/procmail-courier/procmail-authenticate.c-userM
aildir.patch: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/procmail-authenticate.c
-userMaildir.patch: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/procmail.
